assignments.name: querySQL
assignments.value:
=INSERT INTO `MKL_metakosmoslab`.`leads_respondi`(`respondentId`,`name`, `phone`, `email`, `empresa`, `site_instagram`, `perfil`, `cargo`, `funcionarios`, `ativacao_tipo`, `descricao`, `data_ativacao`, `investir`, `pontuacao`, `datetime`, `date`,`utm_source`, `utm_medium`, `utm_campaign`, `utm_term`, `utm_content`, `gclid`, `fbclid`, `form_id`, `form_name`, `status`, `formJson`, `respondentJson`) VALUES ( 
'{{ $json.body.leadID }}',
'{{ $json.body.name }}',
'{{ $json.body.phone.replaceAll(/\D/g,"") }}',
{{ $json.body.email?"'"+$json.body.email.toLowerCase()+"'":"''" || "''" }},
{{ $json.body.company_name?"'"+$json.body.company_name.replaceSpecialChars().replaceAll("'","")+"'":null || '""' }},
null,
{{ $json.perfil?"'"+$json.perfil+"'":null || '""' }},
{{ $json.cargo?"'"+$json.cargo+"'":null || '""' }},
{{ $json.funcionarios?"'"+$json.funcionarios+"'":null || '""' }},
null,
null,
null,
{{ $json.investir?"'"+$json.investir+"'":null || '""' }},
0,
'{{ $json.body.date.toDateTime().format('yyyy-MM-dd TT') }}',
'{{ $json.body.date.toDateTime().format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}',
'{{ $json.body.platform?.replaceAll("%20"," ").replaceAll(" — Cópia"," ") || "" }}',
'{{ $json.body.partner?.replaceAll("%20"," ").replaceAll(" — Cópia"," ") || "" }}',
'{{ $json.body.campaignname?.replaceAll("%20"," ").replaceAll(" — Cópia"," ") || "" }}',
'{{ $json.body.adsetname?.replaceAll("%20"," ").replaceAll(" — Cópia"," ") || "" }}',
'{{ $json.body.adname?.replaceAll("%20"," ").replaceAll(" — Cópia"," ") || "" }}',
'',
'{{ $json.body.leadID }}',
'{{ $json.body.formID }}',
'[MKL] Leads Ads', 
'completed',
'',
'{{ $json.body.toJsonString() }}'
) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 
`name`= VALUES(`name`),
`phone`= VALUES(`phone`),
`email`= VALUES(`email`),
`empresa`= VALUES(`empresa`),
`site_instagram`= VALUES(`site_instagram`),
`perfil`= VALUES(`perfil`),
`cargo`= VALUES(`cargo`),
`funcionarios`= VALUES(`funcionarios`),
`ativacao_tipo`= VALUES(`ativacao_tipo`),
`descricao`= VALUES(`descricao`),
`data_ativacao`= VALUES(`data_ativacao`),
`investir`= VALUES(`investir`),
`pontuacao`= VALUES(`pontuacao`),
`datetime`= VALUES(`datetime`),
`date`= VALUES(`date`),
`utm_source`= VALUES(`utm_source`),
`utm_medium`= VALUES(`utm_medium`),
`utm_campaign`= VALUES(`utm_campaign`),
`utm_term`= VALUES(`utm_term`),
`utm_content`= VALUES(`utm_content`),
`gclid`= VALUES(`gclid`),
`fbclid`= VALUES(`fbclid`),
`form_id`= VALUES(`form_id`),
`form_name`= VALUES(`form_name`),
`status`= VALUES(`status`),
`formJson`= VALUES(`formJson`),
`respondentJson`= VALUES(`respondentJson`)

;
